Element Properties

square_foot
Measurement Tools
Changing tools will clear all created measurements.
  • Double click to add new dimension or dimension points.
  • To delete a dimension, click on it and press keyboard Shift+Backspace.
  • Click the button below to clear dimension.
Clear delete
